reason: NativeHistogramNotCounterWarning fires only when a stored CounterResetHint IS GaugeType; A3 stores no counter_reset_hint column (every decoded histogram is UnknownCounterReset), so this warning can never fire — carved per #125

NativeHistogramNotCounterWarning fires only when a stored CounterResetHint IS GaugeType; A3 stores no counter_reset_hint column (every decoded histogram is UnknownCounterReset), so this warning can never fire — carved per #125

HistogramCounterResetCollisionWarning requires the HistogramStatsIterator's on-the-fly counter-reset-hint detection (CounterReset vs NotCounterReset hint collision across samples), which is not modeled — A3 stores no counter_reset_hint column at all — carved per #125
